name: Deity Timecode Box TC-1
description: Serious content creators can make post-production simpler, faster, and more cost-effective by adding timecode to their multicamera-shoot workflow with the Deity Microphones TC-1.

features.Key Features:: Generate/Jam All SMPTE Timecode Formats | Bluetooth Wireless Control from Phone | 2.4 GHz Wireless Control from Other TC-1 | Drift: <1 Frame per 72 Hours | Locking 3.5mm Timecode Port | Bright OLED Display | Onboard Omnidirectional Microphone | Works with Sidus Audio Mobile App | 28-Hour Battery Life | Range: 30' (2.4 GHz), 250' (Bluetooth)
features.What's in The Box?: Deity Microphones TC-1 Wireless Timecode Generator Box (Bluetooth, 2.4 GHz) | Cold Shoe Mount for DSLR | Locking 3.5mm TRS to TRS Coiled Cable | USB-A to USB-C Charging Cable | Hook-and-Loop Fastener
